RebuildInstance.imageId: The image ID to be specified
RebuildInstance.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password in the image. Default: false. true: use the preset password in the image; false: do not use it. 1. If set to true, password and keypairId must be empty. 2. Only supported for custom or shared images.
RebuildInstance.isPreserveData: Only applies to EBC instance local disks. Whether to preserve data during rebuild. When true, raidId and sysRootSize fields are ignored.
RebuildInstance.adminPass: Instance password, must be encrypted for transmission (see password encryption spec). One of adminPass or keypairId is required.
RebuildInstance.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. Default: true.
RebuildInstance.sysRootSize: Only applies to EBC instances. System disk size.
RebuildInstance.keypairId: The key pair ID to bind to the instance being rebuilt. One of adminPass or keypairId is required.
RebuildInstance.dataPartitionType: Only applies to EBC instances. Data disk partition format.
RebuildInstance.rootPartitionType: Only applies to EBC instances. System disk partition format.
RebuildInstance.raidId: Only applies to EBC instances. RAID configuration ID. Required when isPreserveData is false; ignored when isPreserveData is true.
RebuildInstance.userData: Custom script for the instance to be rebuilt.
RebuildInstance.useLastUserData: Whether to use the previous userData when rebuilding the instance.
RebuildInstance.cleanLastUserData: Clear historical userData. Default: false (i.e., retain historical userData including GPU drivers and CFS filesystem by default).
